register.nameRequired: Name must be at least 2 characters

telegram.description: Link your Telegram account so you can restore your subscription on any new device (iPhone, Android, factory reset).
telegram.linkHint: You'll be sent to @risevp_bot — tap Start to confirm.
telegram.unlinkConfirmBody: After unlinking, you won't be able to restore this subscription on a new device unless you link again.
telegram.restoreBody: Already have a paid plan? Restore it via Telegram.
telegram.openFailed: Couldn't open Telegram. Install the Telegram app and try again.
telegram.linkFailed: Couldn't link Telegram. Please try again.
telegram.restoreFailed: Couldn't start the restore flow. Please try again.

payment.title: Choose a Plan
payment.subtitle: Unlock full protection with a premium plan
payment.idMissing: User ID not available. Please restart the app.
payment.telegramMessage:
Hi! I want to upgrade to {{plan}}.
My ID: {{id}}
payment.telegramError: Could not open Telegram. Please message {{handle}} manually.
payment.howItWorksBody:
1. Tap "Contact Support" on the plan you want.
2. Telegram will open with a pre-filled message containing your ID.
3. Send the message and complete the payment as instructed.
4. Your plan will be activated within a few hours.
payment.errorMessage: Unable to start checkout. Please try again.
payment.disclaimer: Manual activation. Contact support to purchase.

devices.title: My devices
devices.subtitle: Devices currently using this plan. Remove one to free a slot.
devices.removeConfirmBody: {{model}} will lose access to this plan and free a slot.
devices.removeSelfWarning: This is the device you are using right now. After removing it you will be signed out and a new free guest account will be created on next launch.
devices.removeError: Could not remove the device. Please try again.

share.shareSubtitle: Generate a one-time code to add a friend's device to this plan.
share.shareMessage: Use this code to link your VPN app to my plan: {{code}}
share.errorGeneric: Could not generate code. Please try again.
share.linkTitle: Have a code from a friend?
share.linkSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code to link this device to an existing paid plan.
share.linkErrorGeneric: Could not link. Check the code and try again.
share.linkSuccessBody: This device is now using the shared plan.

splitTunnel.title: Split Tunneling
splitTunnel.description: Choose which apps (Android) or domains (iOS) bypass the VPN and use your regular connection.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
